aries.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aries today.
aries.deploy_today: No — the stars are silent and so should your deploy pipeline be.
aries.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet today. Your Slack is not. Your Slack has never been quiet a day in its life.

taurus.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Taurus today.
taurus.deploy_today: Maybe — only if you've been staring at it for 3+ days and you genuinely need a win.
taurus.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. You take this as permission to do nothing. It is not. Your standup is in 4 minutes.

gemini.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Gemini today.
gemini.deploy_today: Maybe — one of you wants to, the other doesn't. Flip a coin. Best of three.
gemini.prophecy: The stars have nothing to say today. You will have too much. Your PR description is 800 words and climbing.

cancer.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Cancer today.
cancer.deploy_today: No — something feels off. Trust that feeling. It's always something.
cancer.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Cancer today. You will spend this quiet time catastrophizing the production alert from Thursday.

leo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Leo today.
leo.deploy_today: Yes — and you will tell everyone about it in three separate channels.
leo.prophecy: The stars say nothing today. You will interpret this as a sign of your own greatness. Your PR has been open for 11 days.

virgo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Virgo today.
virgo.deploy_today: Yes — you have a 47-item checklist. You may proceed.
virgo.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. You will not be. You will find three undocumented edge cases and open tickets for all of them.

libra.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Libra today.
libra.deploy_today: Maybe — you've been deciding for two hours. Either way is fine. It was always going to be fine.
libra.prophecy: The cosmos offer no guidance today. You will take this personally. The PR review you've been sitting on remains unreviewed.

scorpio.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Scorpio today.
scorpio.deploy_today: No — you've found something suspicious in the logs. Do not deploy until you know exactly what it is.
scorpio.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Scorpio today. You do not trust quiet. You are already in the logs.

sagittarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Sagittarius today.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Yes — Sagittarius ships fast and apologizes in the hotfix commit message.
sagittarius.prophecy: Adventure awaits. The adventure is a breaking change you shipped without a feature flag. Onwards.

capricorn.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Capricorn today.
capricorn.deploy_today: Yes — you've been planning this for three sprints. The stars won't stop you and neither will QA.
capricorn.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. You have already filed the ticket, assigned it to yourself, and added it to the sprint. You do not need the cosmos.

aquarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aquarius today.
aquarius.deploy_today: Maybe — you've already refactored the deploy script three times this week. Consider shipping the actual thing.
aquarius.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Aquarius today. You will use this time to rewrite everything in a framework nobody asked for.

pisces.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today.
pisces.deploy_today: No — you're not fully here today and neither is your code.
pisces.prophecy: The stars are dreaming alongside you today. Your unit tests are not dreaming. Your unit tests are failing.
